import io
import string
import list

fn insert_sorted(_ xs: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    let v = match xs.get(i)
    when Some(n)
      n
    when None
      0
    end
    if not inserted and x <= v
      result = list.push(result, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    result = list.push(result, v)
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  let tok = match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, n)
  i = i + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut j = 0
while j < sorted.len()
  let v = match sorted.get(j)
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    0
  end
  if j == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  j = j + 1
end
println(out)
